---
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and social metrics of papers"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: selected-work
    contents:
      - text: "Placeholder — add your selected publications here"
    type: table
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    fields: [title, author, year, journal]
    include:
      section: "Selected Work"
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents:
      - text: "Placeholder — add your peer-reviewed publications here"
    type: table
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    fields: [title, author, year, journal]
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"
---

Note: \* corresponding author

## Selected Work
::: {#selected-work}
:::

## Peer-reviewed Journal Papers
::: {#peer-reviewed}
:::
